name: C2xIsTokenAvailable
title: C2xIsTokenAvailable
syntax: long C2xIsTokenAvailable( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[] );
description: This function checks, if the specified token is part of the packet.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
